rulings.Case Title: TAKASHI NATSUI et al VS. JOHN HAYES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 07, 2014 line 7. CROSS DEFENDANTs TAKASHI NATSUI, CLAIRE HOUDAILLE's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Judicial determination in Kardosh v. Hayes, CGC-13-530191 that John Hayes was not a tenant of the property after March 25, 2013 means Defendant's cross-complaint does not state facts sufficient to constitute a claim for payment from Plaintiff sub-tenant after that date.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN POWELL VS. PHIL HANLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 07, 2014 line 8. DEFENDANT PHILIP HANLEY's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS CONTINUED to July 14, 2014. Moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers. Moving party is ordered to provide a courtesy copy to Dept. 501 by Wednesday, July 9, 2014, with the new hearing date indicated. See SF Local Rule 2.6B. = (501/REQ)
